---
title: "Civic Transparency Project"
subtitle: "Investor Chatbot Technology Primer"
authors: 
  - "Dan Swart"
  - "Holly Richard"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    margin: 0
    center: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    hash: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r}
#| label: slide-2
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 2.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-3
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 3.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-4
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 4.png")

```

---


```{r}
#| label: slide-5
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 5.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-6
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 6.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-7
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 7.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-8
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 8.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-9
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 9.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-10
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 10.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-11
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 11.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-12
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 12.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-13
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "92%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("storyboard/Slide 13.png")

```
